source.definition: A portable computer designed to be used on one's lap.

explanation.sourceText: The word 'laptop' comes from English, combining 'lap' (the top of the thighs when sitting) and 'top' (surface), referring to a computer that can be used on the lap.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul „laptop” provine din limba engleză, compus din 'lap' (poală) și 'top' (partea de sus), deoarece computerul este folosit pe poală.

target.definition: Un calculator portabil, folosit pe poală.

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word 'laptop' was directly borrowed from English, as it denotes a modern technical device.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „laptop” este împrumutat direct din limba engleză, desemnând un dispozitiv tehnic modern.

examples.sourceText: I work every day with my laptop.
examples.targetText: Lucrez în fiecare zi cu laptopul meu.

examples.sourceText: The laptop is light and easy to carry.
examples.targetText: Laptopul este ușor și simplu de transportat.

examples.sourceText: My laptop has a large screen.
examples.targetText: Laptopul meu are un ecran mare.

learningTips.text: The word 'laptop' is used similarly in many languages, making it easy to recognize and remember.
Think of 'lap' as your thighs and 'top' as the surface—this helps you recall that a laptop is a computer used on your lap.
The Romanian word 'laptop' sounds almost the same as in English, so pronunciation is straightforward.
Visualize yourself working comfortably with a portable computer resting on your lap to connect the word with its meaning.
